name: Kafka
desc: A member of the Stellaron Hunters. A dashing, collected, and professional beauty.\nUsed the enchantment of Spirit Whisper to set up {NICKNAME} to absorb the Stellaron.\nHer hobby is shopping for and organizing her collection of coats.

1.name: Da Capo
1.desc: When the Talent triggers a <u>Follow-Up ATK</u>, there is a <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> to increase the DoT received by the target by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

2.name: Fortississimo
2.desc: While Kafka is on the field, DoT dealt by all allies increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

3.name: Capriccio
3.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.name: Recitativo
4.desc: When an enemy target takes DMG from the Shock status inflicted by Kafka, Kafka additionally regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy.

5.name: Doloroso
5.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.name: Leggiero
6.desc: The Shock state inflicted on the enemy target by the Ultimate, Technique, or the Talent-triggered <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> has a DMG multiplier increase of <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> and lasts <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s) longer.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

100501.name: Midnight Tumult
100501.desc: Deals Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Kafka's ATK to a one designated enemy.
100501.simple_desc: Deals minor Lightning DMG to one enemy.

100502.name: Caressing Moonlight
100502.desc: Deals Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Kafka's ATK to a target enemy and Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of Kafka's ATK to enemies adjacent to it.\nIf the target enemy is currently receiving DoT, all DoTs currently placed on that enemy immediately produce DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of their original DMG.
100502.simple_desc: Deals Lightning DMG to one enemy and minor Lightning DMG to adjacent targets.\nIf the primary target is currently afflicted with a DoT effect, the DoT <color=#f29e38ff>deals DMG 1 extra time</color>.

100503.name: Twilight Trill
100503.desc: Deals Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Kafka's ATK to all enemies, with a <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> for enemies hit to become Shocked and immediately take DMG from their current Shock state, equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color> of its original DMG. Shock lasts for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s).\nWhile Shocked, enemies receive Lightning DoT equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> of Kafka's ATK at the beginning of each turn.
100503.simple_desc: Deals minor Lightning DMG to all enemies, with a high chance of <color=#f29e38ff>Shocking them</color>.\nIf the enemies are currently Shocked, the Shock status <color=#f29e38ff>deals DMG 1 extra time</color>.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

100504.name: Gentle but Cruel
100504.desc: After Kafka's teammate uses Basic ATK on an enemy target, Kafka immediately launches <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> and deals Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of her ATK to that target, with a <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> to inflict Shock equivalent to that applied by her Ultimate to the attacked enemy target, lasting for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turns. This effect can only be triggered 1 time per turn.
100504.simple_desc: After a teammate uses Basic ATK on an enemy, Kafka immediately launches <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> and deals Lightning DMG with a high chance of <color=#f29e38ff>inflicting Shock</color> to that target. This effect can only be triggered 1 time per turn.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

100506.name: Attack
100506.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

100507.name: Mercy Is Not Forgiveness
100507.desc: Immediately attacks all enemies within a set range. After entering battle, deals Lightning DMG equal to <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> of Kafka's ATK to all enemies, with a <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> to inflict Shock equivalent to that applied by her Ultimate on every enemy target for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
100507.simple_desc: Attacks all enemies within range. After entering battle, deals minor Lightning DMG to all enemies, with a high chance to <color=#f29e38ff>Shock</color> them.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

1.point_desc: When the Ultimate is used, enemy targets will now receive DMG immediately from all currently applied DoT sources instead of just receiving DMG immediately from the currently applied Shock state.
If an enemy is defeated while Shocked, Kafka additionally regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy.
The <u>base chance</u> for target enemies to be Shocked by the Ultimate, the Technique, and the Talent-triggered <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

descs: Skill can cause DoTs on <color=#f29e38ff>all its targets</color> to immediately produce 1 additional instance of DMG
Follow-Up ATK's <color=#f29e38ff>trigger count increases</color>, and Follow-Up ATK can also cause <color=#f29e38ff>enemies' DoTs to immediately produce 1 additional instance of DMG</color>

1100502.name: Caressing Moonlight
1100502.desc: Deals Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Kafka's ATK to one designated enemy and Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of Kafka's ATK to adjacent targets.\nIf the designated enemy or the adjacent targets are currently afflicted with DoT, all DoTs currently placed on those enemies immediately produces DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> or <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> of the original DMG.

1100503.simple_desc: Deals minor Lightning DMG to all enemies, with a high chance of <color=#f29e38ff>Shocking them</color>.\nIf the enemies are currently afflicted with DoT debuff(s), the DoT(s) will <color=#f29e38ff>produce 1 additional instance of DMG</color>.

This effect can trigger up to <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> time(s), <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> of which can be regained at the end of Kafka's turn.

1.point_desc: When an ally target's Effect Hit Rate is <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> or higher, Kafka increases that target's ATK by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.
If an enemy target is defeated while Shocked, Kafka additionally regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy.

After using Ultimate, restores the triggerable count of Talent's <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> by 1. And the Talent's <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> can cause all DoTs debuffs currently on the target to immediately produce DMG equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the original DMG.
